<WMS_Capabilities version="1.3.0" updateSequence="2333" xmlns="http://www.opengis.net/wms" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="https://schemas.opengis.net/wms/ https://schemas.opengis.net/wms/1.3.0/capabilities_1_3_0.xsd">
  <Service>
    <Name>Lizard</Name>
    <Title>Lizard Web Map Service</Title>
    <Abstract>WMS server for raster visualization</Abstract>
    <OnlineResource xlink:type="simple" xlink:href="http://www.lizard.net"/>
    <MaxWidth>2048</MaxWidth>
    <MaxHei

classification_reasons: No FeatureListURL or vector-format DataURL on any layer.
GetFeatureInfo present (formats: application/json, application/geo+json, text/plain) -- per-pixel attribute query only; NOT authoritative polygon geometry.

classification_reasons: All variants failed; HTTP statuses observed: [404]
ServiceException: detail: The requested layer collection does not exist or is empty
Lizard returns HTTP 404 both for genuinely non-existent rasters AND for tenant-private rasters viewed anonymously (existence is hidden by design). To disambiguate, retry with LIZARD_API_TOKEN.
